title: The Food Experience
body:
this mod adds more food and revamps some mobs, it includes:

new maple biome

tomato

pizza

spagetti 

KNIFES

cake

sausages

rice

asparagus

durian

butterflies

camel meat

and more!

CurseForge:
[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-food-experience](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-food-experience)
